title: Product Passport Source Manifest Schema
description: JSON Schema for product_passport/reference_sources/source_manifest.json. Prototype/reference only — not an official GS1 or DPP production schema.

generated_for.description: Release or context this manifest was generated for.

source_id.description: Unique snake_case identifier for this source.

source_url.description: URL of the public source, or PLACEHOLDER if not yet known.

version.description: Version string of the source artifact.

sector.description: Industry sector or scope for this source.

local_path.description: Path to the local file relative to the repository root.

sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the downloaded file, or PLACEHOLDER.

retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 date/datetime when the file was retrieved.

public_accessible.description: Whether the source URL is publicly accessible.

proof_of_concept_note.description: Notes on the proof-of-concept or placeholder status.

usage_note.description: How this source is used in the project.

used_by.description: List of features or releases using this source.

normalized_output.description: Path to a normalized output derived from this source, if any.
